description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency with JavaScript's notoriously tricky native Date API, focusing on formatting and localization without relying on third-party libraries. It features an intermediate difficulty level with a playful, slightly sarcastic yet encouraging tone that aims to both test and deepen practical knowledge.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Native date formatting, Date localization, API quirks and pitfalls
Audience: JavaScript and web developers seeking to master native date handling
